quotes.selection: I fight on my own terms.

Vegeta ID to be specified: Your punches are too slow Vegeta.
Android17 ID to be specified: Seventeen, don't get in my way.

passive.name: Cyborg Pulse
passive.description: Android 18's third basic attack gains 125% bonus attack speed with an uncancellable windup and deals magic damage to the primary target and nearby enemies. Deals 150% damage to monsters and executes minions below 25 health. Hidden Passive: Whenever Krillin as an ally gets injured, 18 gains +5% Attack Damage, +5% Attack Speed, and +5% Movement Speed for 4.5 seconds. Also gains extra bounty for killing Dr. Gero.

h1.name: Energy Strike
h1.description: Android 18 blasts an energy bolt in the target direction that deals magic damage to the first two enemies hit.

effects.note: Hits first two enemies in the direction

h2.name: Energy Shield
h2.description: Android 18 grants herself a shield for up to 5 seconds and creates three spheres that orbit her counterclockwise, detonating upon contact with enemies. If all three spheres detonate, Energy Shield is reapplied, stacking and refreshing the duration.

effects.note: Detonation of all 3 orbs reapplies and stacks shield

h3.name: Cyborg Dash
h3.description: Android 18 dashes in the target direction, dealing physical damage to enemies near landing location and granting ghosting to non-champions for 4 seconds. Stops prematurely on champion collision, knocking back all nearby champions and stunning them for 0.75 seconds, while gaining bonus attack speed.

h4.name: Master Martial
h4.description: Android 18 overclocks her cybernetic core, entering an empowered state and becoming ghosted. She can refresh the duration whenever she scores a takedown against an enemy champion within 3 seconds of damaging them.

effects.refreshOnKill: Refreshes duration on takedown within 3 seconds of damaging enemy champion

lore:
Android 18, originally a human named Lazuli, was transformed into a powerful cyborg by Dr. Gero of the Red Ribbon Army. Alongside her twin brother, Android 17, she was created to eliminate Goku, though both siblings retained free will and defied their creator. Calm, confident, and sharp-tongued, 18 possesses immense strength, durability, and speed that rival the strongest fighters in the universe. Despite her cold exterior, she shows a protective and caring side, especially toward Krillin, whom she eventually marries.

Her combat style blends precision and relentless power, enhanced by her ability to channel energy blasts and withstand damage far beyond normal limits. 18's pragmatic nature makes her an efficient and strategic fighter, unshaken even in the face of overwhelming opponents. She is defined by her independence and loyalty to those she chooses to protect, standing as both a fearsome warrior and a devoted ally.
